text.title: headless-cli-four-guards Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the invocation run in an interactive TTY with a human watching?

branch.conclusion: Skip the guards; interactive UX is the point.
Wrap in `timeout`, use `codex exec`, set `--sandbox workspace-write`, redirect `< /dev/null`.
Set headless flag, tool config, run-time cap, `< /dev/null`.

text.example: q-interactive → branch(false) → q-which-cli → branch(claude_code) → conclusion(r4-per-cli-mapping). Result: claude -p "$TASK" --allowedTools "Read,Edit" --max-turns 20 < /dev/null.
